title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio addresses character consistency in AI-generated films through storyboard mode that locks character appearance across scenes. The tool provides multi-shot generation with camera presets, an extend feature for longer shots, and a built-in timeline editor for post-production without external software.
